import client from"./client";import{setTokens,setUser}from"./storage";export const login=async payload=>{const{data}=await client.post("/auth/login/",payload);setTokens({access:data.access,refresh:data.refresh});setUser(data.user);return data.user;};export const register=async payload=>{const{data}=await client.post("/auth/register/",payload);setTokens({access:data.access,refresh:data.refresh});setUser(data.user);return data.user;};export const registerWithoutLogin=async payload=>{const{data}=await client.post("/auth/register/",payload);// Don't auto-login, just return user data
return data.user;};export const profile=async()=>{const{data}=await client.get("/auth/profile/");setUser(data);return data;};
